title: Software Engineer
description: Software Engineers design, build, test, and maintain software applications. They focus on writing clean, efficient, and scalable code, understanding computer science fundamentals, and using robust software engineering methodologies.

topics.name: Choose & Learn a Language (Java/C++)
topics.description: Master programming concepts like variables, conditionals, loops, functions, and Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) in Java or C++.

topics.name: Git & Collaborative Development
topics.description: Learn version control concepts: branching, merging, pull requests, and resolving conflicts.

topics.name: Command Line Basics
topics.description: Navigate the directory tree, manage files, and execute basic commands in Bash or PowerShell.
resources: The Missing Semester of Your CS Education (MIT)

topics.name: Linear Data Structures
topics.description: Understand memory allocation and operation complexity for Arrays, Linked Lists, Stacks, and Queues.

topics.name: Sorting & Searching Algorithms
topics.description: Implement and analyze algorithms: Binary Search, Bubble Sort, Merge Sort, and Quick Sort, including Big O notation.

topics.name: Operating Systems & Networking
topics.description: Learn basic computer systems concepts: processes, threads, memory management, and TCP/IP protocol suite.

topics.name: Non-Linear Data Structures
topics.description: Master Trees (BST, AVL), Graphs, Hash Tables, and algorithms like BFS, DFS, and Dijkstra's algorithm.

topics.name: Relational Databases & SQL
topics.description: Understand database normalization, schemas, indexes, and write complex queries to manipulate relational data.

topics.name: Object-Oriented Design (OOD)
topics.description: Study design patterns (Singleton, Factory, Observer) and SOLID principles for writing maintainable code.

topics.name: Software Testing & Quality
topics.description: Learn Unit Testing, Integration Testing, and Mocking frameworks. Understand TDD (Test Driven Development).

topics.name: System Design Basics
topics.description: Understand architectural concepts: Client-Server, REST APIs, microservices, load balancers, and caching.

topics.name: Capstone Project & CI/CD
topics.description: Develop a full-featured desktop or web application. Set up basic CI/CD pipelines (e.g. GitHub Actions) to automate testing.
